problem id: aa72ae9f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11110111
  01101100 -> 10010111
  01010111 -> 00001001
  00101101 -> 00010011
  00110110 -> 01001011
  11011110 -> 00110111
  00001110 -> 11011011
  01010010 -> 00010111

query: 10100111
predicted answer: 00100110
